title: Verify user can successfully login with valid email and password longer than 8 characters
description: Validate that passwords exceeding the minimum length requirement are accepted.
preconditions: User account exists with password longer than 8 characters
User is on the login screen

steps.description: 1. Enter a valid email address in the email field
2. Enter a valid password (e.g., 12 characters) in the password field

expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the app dashboard
